title: Positive flow: Navigating through the settings page
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Verify that the header displays the title 'Contacts'. | Check the 'Days or Weeks' section and ensure the dropdown is labeled 'Age in X days'. | Check the 'Display Name' section and ensure the dropdown is labeled 'Default'. | Check the 'Invisible Contacts' toggle switch and ensure it is labeled 'Enable to show hidden contacts'. | Check the 'Contact picture' toggle switch and ensure it is labeled 'Enable to show the photos of the contacts'. | Check the 'Photo Source' toggle switch and ensure it is labeled 'Prefer the photo from Facebook'.
expected_result: The header displays the title 'Contacts'. | The 'Days or Weeks' section dropdown is labeled 'Age in X days'. | The 'Display Name' section dropdown is labeled 'Default'. | The 'Invisible Contacts' toggle switch is labeled 'Enable to show hidden contacts'. | The 'Contact picture' toggle switch is labeled 'Enable to show the photos of the contacts'. | The 'Photo Source' toggle switch is labeled 'Prefer the photo from Facebook'.

title: Negative flow: Invalid input in dropdowns
test_data: Invalid input in 'Days or Weeks' dropdown | Invalid input in 'Display Name' dropdown
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Select an invalid option from the 'Days or Weeks' dropdown. | Select an invalid option from the 'Display Name' dropdown.
expected_result: The app displays an error message for invalid input in the 'Days or Weeks' dropdown. | The app displays an error message for invalid input in the 'Display Name' dropdown.

title: Boundary validation: Toggle switch states
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Toggle the 'Invisible Contacts' switch. | Toggle the 'Contact picture' switch. | Toggle the 'Photo Source' switch.
expected_result: The 'Invisible Contacts' switch toggles between enabled and disabled states. | The 'Contact picture' switch toggles between enabled and disabled states. | The 'Photo Source' switch toggles between enabled and disabled states.

title: Usability: Accessibility and navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Use voice commands to navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Use screen reader to navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Use keyboard navigation to navigate to the Contacts settings page.
expected_result: Voice commands successfully navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Screen reader successfully navigates to the Contacts settings page. | Keyboard navigation successfully navigates to the Contacts settings page.

title: Usability: Interruption and resume
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Simulate a phone call interruption. | Resume the app and verify that the Contacts settings page is still open. | Simulate a notification interruption. | Resume the app and verify that the Contacts settings page is still open.
expected_result: The Contacts settings page remains open after a phone call interruption. | The Contacts settings page remains open after a notification interruption.

title: Usability: Data persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the Contacts settings page. | Toggle the 'Invisible Contacts' switch. | Navigate away from the Contacts settings page. | Navigate back to the Contacts settings page. | Verify that the 'Invisible Contacts' switch state is preserved.
expected_result: The 'Invisible Contacts' switch state is preserved after navigating away and back to the Contacts settings page.
